description_long: This object is a compact keyboard with a rectangular, low-profile body and a uniform matte finish. The surface is populated with evenly spaced, slightly raised keys that cover most of the top face, with no visible gaps or missing keys. The keyboard lacks a numeric keypad, suggesting a tenkeyless or 65% layout, and the keycaps appear to be blank, with no visible legends or labels. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, with no visible ports, cables, or branding. The overall construction appears solid, likely made from molded plastic, and the color is a deep, uniform black. The keyboard is designed for desktop use and would typically be found in offices, homes, or public workstations in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black keyboard with a uniform surface and blank keycaps, lacking a numeric keypad. The body is solid and unbranded, with no visible cables or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard and the arrangement of the keys, with the spacebar and bottom row clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth and height of the keyboard, with the staggered rows of keys visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the keyboard, with the tops of the keys visible but no ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the other side of the keyboard and the uniformity of the key layout.
